name: dynamic-workflows-for-codex
description: Dynamic workflow runtime with bootstrap, doctor checks, and Codex CLI skill routing.

interface.shortDescription: Bootstrap and route Codex dynamic workflows.
interface.longDescription: Packages a Codex skill wrapper that bootstraps the repo-local plugin marketplace, runs cdw doctor readiness checks, routes real workers through the user's codex-cli login, and delegates review, debugging, workflow specs, staged runs, resume, and guarded migrations to the cdw external runtime.
defaultPrompt: Bootstrap this clone for Codex dynamic workflows.
Run cdw doctor for this clone.
Review this branch with dynamic workflows.
Debug this flaky test with cdw.
Create and run a reusable workflow spec.
